item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Time to Stand Up
item.description: Edit: Holy Shit, I made front page for the first time ever! Thanks, everyone. And seriously, please consider my requests at the end of the paragraph below. Stay the fight, hold the line, and never, never give up. Editorial cartoon by Luckovich from the Atlanta Urinal and Constipation. Ahem, sorry- the Journal and Constitution. (sorry, as an Atlanta native, old habits die hard. I have nothing but respect for all unbiased, ethical journalists!) The original Tiananmen Square Massacre happened my junior year of high school. I still distinctly remember watching the video of the original "Tank Man" on the news, showing great bravery in his defiance. I really, sincerely hope we do not see anything even remotely as horrible happen on the streets of D.C. (or anywhere in America) as happened in Tiananmen. For me, that would be a day even darker than 9/11. Which is saying A LOT. We are in dark times, my friends. Stay safe, watch out for your friends and families, stand up for and support your neighbors that are facing persecution, and above all, DO NOT let that orange motherfucker take over our country without a fight!
item.dc:creator: howcansomeonepossiblyhavethesameweirdusernamealready

item.title: I wish this was some kind of joke
item.description: It is commonly suspected among my care team that I have CTE. CTE is a degenerative brain condition caused by repeated head injuries, most prevalent among contact sports athletes. I was physically abused as a child and physically abused as a young adult. CTE has an onset of 8 to 10 years. About 2 years ago it started showing. It starts off slowly. Existing mental health symptoms get worse. And worse. And worse. And worse. And then the physical symptoms start. Loss of coordination. Ocular problems. Auditory processing issues. And then the dementia. Memory loss. Unusual amounts of confusion. Anger issues. For a few years I had my anger problems in a choke hold. But my grip started to slip as other symptoms began to wear me down. I have no idea how long I have left. 5 years? 10 years? I just want to play Fallout 5, Elder Scrolls 6, and GTA 6 before I'm no longer mentally capable of doing so.
item.dc:creator: TheGirlWithRedHair1295

item.title: Effectively kidnapped for not consenting to constant armed escort. This some bullscheisse.
item.description: Collier is being forced to sleep on the state house floor rather than be escorted out until she signs over to the governors wants... add intimidation and coercion to the list. Saw this further down in usersub and it was unfathomably downvoted out of the feed. Somethin' aint right there either.

item.title: It be like that
item.description:
It’s crazy to me how many people understand how evil companies like Blackstone are, but don’t understand they are the inevitable result of ✨capitalism✨ The rich people of the world do not want to compete. They want to set up toll booths on things we need to live and extort you for as much as they can.
If private ownership is the issue, collective ownership is the solution. That’s all capitalism and socialism are. Do we let random rich assholes own everything? Or do we collectively own everything. Those are the two options, and the one we’re doing sucks
item.dc:creator: Mgxr44

item.title: I had to delete my previous post
item.description:
Three of my foster kittens were being taken care of by an amazing fosterer, and despite her best efforts, they passed. She bottle fed them every three hours for over a week but they just wouldn’t eat. I made a huge mistake and posted her name, so I had to take the post down. I’m so sorry. I feel so stupid.
Harry
Cumulonimbus
And Zypher will never be forgotten. I’m going to the humane society tomorrow to see their brothers Stratus and Cirrus and weigh them to see how they’re progressing. I’m so sorry to the foster mama that I accidentally posted her name. Won’t happen again
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.description: This is not just for the people in the us. We currently have a handful of billionaires racing to become Weyland Corp and this is just another domino falling. We the people have a choice to make, let them take everything or fix the problem

item.title: Texas has done lost their damn minds.
item.description: What’s happening in Texas is unacceptable. Republicans have locked Texas State Representative Nicole Collier inside the chamber and are demanding that Democrats sign permission slips and take police escorts to leave. Let’s stand with Rep. Collier and every Black woman leader who refuses to be silent. Call the Sergeant of Arms at (512) 463-0910 and the Chairman of House Administration, Charlie Green at (512) 463-0784 #WWBW #CalltoAction https://www.cbsnews.com/texas/news/texas-democrat-nicole-collier-locked-inside-house-chamber-returning-texas-capitol/
item.dc:creator: RocknRootRanchcuzallwegotisrocksandrootsandafewtrees

item.title: Police in Kentucky say Stephanie Carlquist poured salt into the engine of her ex-boyfriend’s car, glitter in the AC vent, slashed a tire, cracked the windshield, cracked the rearview mirror & shattered the car’s radio screen.
item.description: She apologized and said she was stressed out. I can fix her. More Detail: https://www.wect.com/2025/08/17/damaged-beyond-repair-woman-accused-pouring-salt-ex-boyfriends-car-engine-throwing-glitter-ac/

item.title: I make sure he’s asleep before I close my eyes
item.description: A homeless man has captured the attention of thousands, not for begging, but for the way he rocks his dog to sleep every night. When asked why, he explained that life hadn’t always been this way. “When I first got him, we had an apartment,” he said softly. “Living on the street has been a hard adjustment for him. The honking, the sirens, the people, it keeps him up. So every night, I make sure he’s asleep before I close my eyes.”
item.dc:creator: DataStream

item.title: GovBrief Today - What Happened #200
item.description: Foreign leaders flew into a militarily occupied Washington for a wartime summit, 3½ years into Russia’s full-scale invasion of Ukraine. NATO and EU heads pressed Trump on Ukraine while DC streets sat under armed patrols, restaurants down by one-third, democracy suffocating at home. This is what authoritarian rule looks like. Stopping it is on us. Get local on Mobilize. The coordinated Workers over Billionaires event is on Sept 1. Don't rely on the algorithm to keep you informed. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you always know what's going on. Add your email at govbrief dot today, on Facebook, or on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com 1. https://go.govbrief.today/more-states-dc-troops 2. https://go.govbrief.today/texas-dems-police-surveillance 3. https://go.govbrief.today/johnson-vows-stop-california 4. https://go.govbrief.today/epstein-files-comer-friday 5. https://go.govbrief.today/multilateral-peace-summit-zelenskyy 6. https://go.govbrief.today/hud-documents-english-only 7. https://go.govbrief.today/finalize-hhs-layoffs 8. https://go.govbrief.today/air-force-chief-out 9. https://go.govbrief.today/chips-act-intel-stake 10. https://go.govbrief.today/bls-nominee-conspiracy-theories 11. https://go.govbrief.today/co-deputy-fbi-bailey 12. https://go.govbrief.today/newsmax-pays-election-lies 13. https://go.govbrief.today/maine-officer-self-deports 14. https://go.govbrief.today/internment-camp-ft-bliss 15. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-voting-mail-unconstitutional 16. https://go.govbrief.today/education-civil-rights-biased 17. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-denies-restaurant-downturn Yesterday - https://go.govbrief.today/oklahoma-teacher-loyalty-test Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/workers-over-billionaires-events Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
